turns.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512"><rect x="50" y="250" width="412" height="100" rx="20" fill="#3498db" /><path d="M120 250 L180 150 L330 150 L390 250 Z" fill="#2980b9" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="5" /><rect x="180" y="165" width="60" height="70" fill="#ecf0f1" /><rect x="270" y="165" width="60" height="70" fill="#ecf0f1" /><circle cx="130" cy="350" r="45" fill="#2c3e50" /><circle cx="130" cy="350" r="20" fill="#bdc3c7" /><circle cx="380" cy="350" r="45" fill="#2c3e50" /><circle cx="380" cy="350" r="20" fill="#bdc3c7" /><rect x="440" y="270" width="22" height="40" rx="5" fill="#f1c40f" /><rect x="50" y="270" width="15" height="30" rx="5" fill="#e74c3c" /></svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="512" height="512" fill="#f0f0f0"/><rect x="0" y="400" width="512" height="112" fill="#2d5a27"/><g transform="translate(80, 380)"><rect x="-15" y="0" width="30" height="60" fill="#5d4037"/><polygon points="0,-120 -60,0 60,0" fill="#1b5e20"/><polygon points="0,-160 -50,-40 50,-40" fill="#2e7d32"/><polygon points="0,-200 -40,-80 40,-80" fill="#388e3c"/></g><g transform="translate(220, 420)"><rect x="-12" y="0" width="24" height="50" fill="#5d4037"/><polygon points="0,-100 -50,0 50,0" fill="#1b5e20"/><polygon points="0,-140 -40,-30 40,-30" fill="#2e7d32"/><polygon points="0,-180 -30,-70 30,-70" fill="#388e3c"/></g><g transform="translate(380, 390)"><rect x="-18" y="0" width="36" height="70" fill="#5d4037"/><polygon points="0,-140 -70,0 70,0" fill="#1b5e20"/><polygon points="0,-190 -60,-50 60,-50" fill="#2e7d32"/><polygon points="0,-240 -50,-100 50,-100" fill="#388e3c"/></g><g transform="translate(480, 410)"><rect x="-10" y="0" width="20" height="40" fill="#5d4037"/><polygon points="0,-90 -45,0 45,0" fill="#1b5e20"/><polygon points="0,-130 -35,-30 35,-30" fill="#2e7d32"/></g><g transform="translate(30, 430)"><rect x="-8" y="0" width="16" height="30" fill="#5d4037"/><polygon points="0,-80 -40,0 40,0" fill="#1b5e20"/><polygon points="0,-120 -30,-30 30,-30" fill="#2e7d32"/></g></svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">
  <!-- Person 1 (Whispering) -->
  <circle cx="180" cy="180" r="50" fill="#f0d0b0" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4" />
  <path d="M130,350 Q130,250 180,250 Q230,250 230,350" fill="#f0d0b0" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4" />
  
  <!-- Hand cupping mouth -->
  <path d="M210,180 Q240,180 250,140" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <path d="M215,190 Q245,190 255,150" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <!-- Person 2 (Listening) -->
  <circle cx="360" cy="200" r="50" fill="#f0d0b0" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4" />
  <path d="M310,370 Q310,270 360,270 Q410,270 410,370" fill="#f0d0b0" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4" />
  
  <!-- Ear of Person 2 -->
  <path d="M315,185 Q300,185 305,215 Q315,225 325,215" fill="#f0d0b0" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" />

  <!-- Sound dashes (Whisper effect) -->
  <line x1="260" y1="180" x2="290" y2="190" stroke="#888" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="5,5" />
  <line x1="260" y1="195" x2="290" y2="205" stroke="#888" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="5,5" />
  <line x1="260" y1="210" x2="290" y2="220" stroke="#888" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="5,5" />
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512"><circle cx="256" cy="256" r="200" fill="#FFD700" stroke="#000" stroke-width="5"/><ellipse cx="180" cy="200" rx="25" ry="35" fill="#fff" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3"/><circle cx="180" cy="200" r="10" fill="#000"/><ellipse cx="332" cy="200" rx="25" ry="35" fill="#fff" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3"/><circle cx="332" cy="200" r="10" fill="#000"/><path d="M150 150 Q180 130 210 150" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M302 150 Q332 130 362 150" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M180 350 Q200 330 220 350 Q240 370 260 350 Q280 330 300 350 Q320 370 340 350" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M100 200 Q80 220 100 240" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M412 200 Q432 220 412 240" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M120 100 Q110 120 120 140" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M392 100 Q402 120 392 140" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M256 380 L256 420" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/></svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512"><rect width="512" height="512" fill="#1a1a2e"/><path d="M150 200 Q150 120 230 120 Q260 120 280 140 Q310 100 380 100 Q450 100 450 180 Q480 180 480 230 Q480 280 430 280 L130 280 Q80 280 80 230 Q80 180 130 180 L150 180" fill="#4a4e69"/><path d="M280 220 L220 360 L280 360 L200 500 L340 320 L270 320 L330 220 Z" fill="#ffcc00" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M180 300 L160 380 L190 380 L150 460" fill="none" stroke="#ffcc00" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M380 300 L360 350 L390 350 L370 410" fill="none" stroke="#ffcc00" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="100" cy="100" r="2" fill="white"/><circle cx="400" cy="50" r="2" fill="white"/><circle cx="50" cy="400" r="2" fill="white"/><circle cx="450" cy="450" r="2" fill="white"/></svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512"><path d="M256 50 L330 150 L330 350 L256 400 L182 350 L182 150 Z" fill="#cccccc" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M256 50 C256 50 330 100 330 180 L182 180 C182 100 256 50 256 50" fill="#ff4444"/><circle cx="256" cy="240" r="25" fill="#88ccff" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/><path d="M182 280 L130 380 L182 380 Z" fill="#ff4444" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M330 280 L382 380 L330 380 Z" fill="#ff4444" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M220 400 L256 480 L292 400 Z" fill="#ffaa00"/><path d="M235 400 L256 450 L277 400 Z" fill="#ffff00"/></svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512"><rect width="512" height="512" fill="#f0f0f0"/><path d="M50 400 Q 150 350, 200 420 T 350 380 T 480 450" fill="none" stroke="#8b4513" stroke-width="12" stroke-dasharray="20,15"/><circle cx="480" cy="450" r="8" fill="#8b4513"/><path d="M240 280 L255 240 L270 280 M255 240 L255 310" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="255" cy="230" r="10" fill="#333"/><path d="M255 260 L230 270 M255 260 L285 255" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M100 100 Q 150 80, 200 120" fill="none" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="15" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M350 150 Q 400 130, 450 170" fill="none" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="15" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M50 400 L40 390 M50 400 L60 390" fill="none" stroke="#8b4513" stroke-width="4"/></svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">
  <!-- Face showing a bitter reaction -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="200" fill="#FFD700" stroke="#000" stroke-width="8" />
  
  <!-- Squinting eyes -->
  <path d="M160 220 Q200 190 240 220" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <path d="M272 220 Q312 190 352 220" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" />
  
  <!-- Pucker/Wavy mouth -->
  <path d="M206 360 Q231 330 256 360 T306 360" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" />
  
  <!-- Wrinkle lines -->
  <path d="M240 260 L272 260" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <path d="M245 275 L267 275" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <!-- Lemon slice to represent the taste -->
  <g transform="translate(380, 380) scale(0.8)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="60" fill="#FFF700" stroke="#000" stroke-width="4" />
    <path d="M-50 0 L50 0 M0 -50 L0 50 M-35 -35 L35 35 M-35 35 L35 -35" stroke="#FFF" stroke-width="4" />
  </g>
</svg>
